response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy depth, or the 15-year technical leadership trajectory expected for a director-level AI strategy role; her resume also contains inconsistent name alignment (Szabo Bogdan vs. Maria Rodriguez) and minimal focus on cloud-native AI systems.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops and public contributions, indicating leadership potential
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI/ML-powered products or platforms as required
Resume name inconsistency (Szabo Bogdan) raises red flags about authenticity or attention to detail
Limited documentation of cloud architecture strategy or direct experience advising enterprise AI adoption
